name: Endpoint with Network Volume
description: Create a serverless endpoint with a network volume attached for persistent model storage.
user_intent: Create a serverless endpoint with a network volume for persistent model storage. First create a 10GB network volume named rpcli-eval-ep-vol in US-TX-3. Then create an endpoint called rpcli-eval-ep-vol using image runpod/pytorch:2.1.0 on ADA_24 GPUs with that network volume attached via --network-volume. Verify the endpoint shows the networkVolumeId.
expected_outcome: Agent creates a volume, creates an endpoint with --network-volume pointing to that volume ID, and verifies the endpoint has the networkVolumeId set.
